mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE userid = #{param1} AND userpwd = #{param2}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD (writer, content, title, regdate) VALUES (#{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET viewcnt = viewcnt + 1 WHERE bno = #{param1}
mapper.select: SELECT ano, userid, state, DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as work_date, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%H:%i:%s') as start_time, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%H:%i:%s') as end_time FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE userid = #{param1} ORDER BY work_date DESC, start_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE userid = #{param1} AND work_date = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (userid, work_date, start_time, state) VALUES (#{param1}, CURDATE(), CURTIME(), #{param2})
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET end_time = CURTIME() WHERE userid = #{param1} AND work_date = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER (userid, userpwd, username, dept, job_title, role, status, phone, email, address) VALUES (#{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, #{param4}, #{param5}, #{param6}, '재직', #{param7}, #{param8}, #{param9})
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET userpwd = #{param2}, username = #{param3}, dept = #{param4}, job_title = #{param5}, role = #{param6}, status = #{param7}, phone = #{param8}, email = #{param9}, address = #{param10} WHERE userid = #{param1}
mapper.select: SELECT dno, category, title, img_path, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d') as regdate, manager FROM DIAGRAM WHERE category = #{param1}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOGS_TABLE (category, log_date, writer, worker, temp, memo, content) VALUES (#{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, #{param4}, #{param5}, #{param6}, #{param7})
